component_identification.content: Components: 90 translucent dice (18 each in 5 colors), 12 window pattern cards (24 sides), 10 public objective cards, 5 private objective cards, 12 tool cards, 24 favor tokens, 4 player boards, 1 round track, 1 score marker, dice bag, and rulebook.

core_game_loop.content: Play 10 rounds. Each round, roll and draft dice in snake order (start player to end, then back). On your turn place one drafted die in your window following placement restrictions or use a tool by paying favor tokens. At round end, leftover dice go to round track and start player passes clockwise.

detailed_rules.content: First placement must be on edge/corner. Future placements must be orthogonally or diagonally adjacent to an existing die. You may never place same color or same number orthogonally adjacent. Window spaces may require specific color or number; blank spaces accept any die. Tool cards break rules temporarily but require exact payment and timing; first use costs 1 favor token, subsequent uses generally cost 2 (per base rules). Public objectives score shared patterns (e.g., color sets, shade varieties), private objective scores sum of one color in your window. Favor tokens come from choosing an easier side of window card at setup. Round-track dice matter for certain tools and can influence final decisions. Common mistakes: forgetting orthogonal duplicate restrictions and misapplying tool sequencing.

scoring_and_endgame.content: After round 10, score all public objective cards, your private objective card, and add remaining favor tokens. Subtract 1 point per empty space in your window. Highest score wins; tie-breaker is private objective total, then favor tokens.

beginner_strategy.content: 1) Preserve flexibility early—avoid trapping high-restriction spaces too soon. 2) Draft for both survival and denial; taking a die that blocks an opponent can be worth it. 3) Treat tools as tempo spikes, not constant crutches. 4) Track empty-space penalties from midgame onward. 5) Build around 1–2 public objectives plus your private color rather than chasing every pattern.

metadata.notes: Check 4 failed: total_token_count is 402; must be 800-3000 (hard reject if <800 or >5000)
